name: ballerina
description: Ballerina Language support, debugging, graphical visualization, AI-based data-mapping and many more.

ballerina.home.description: Specify the Ballerina home directory path.

ballerina.icpPath.description: Path to the ICP binary. If empty, the extension will attempt to auto-detect from the default installation location.

ballerina.icpUrl.description: URL of the Integration Control Plane (ICP) server.

ballerina.isBI.description: Activate features for WSO2 Integrator: BI.

ballerina.scope.description: Define the scope of the project.

ballerina.debugLog.description: Enable printing debug messages on to the Ballerina output channel.

ballerina.enableLiveReload.description: Enable automatic re-run of Ballerina service projects upon file changes.

ballerina.traceLog.description: Enable printing trace messages on to the Ballerina output channel.

ballerina.enableFileWatcher.description: Enable watching file change events of the project.

ballerina.enableSemanticHighlighting.description: Enable semantic highlighting for Ballerina source.

ballerina.enableBackgroundDriftCheck.description: Enable background drift check for Ballerina source.

ballerina.enableRunFast.description: Enable faster execution by using the Language Server's compilation cache to reduce startup time.

ballerina.samplesDownloadDirectory.description: Specify the directory where you want to download the Ballerina samples. Leave it empty to use the default download directory.

ballerina.enableInlayHints.description: Experimental: Enable inlay hints for Ballerina.

ballerina.useDistributionLanguageServer.description: Use Ballerina distribution language server instead of bundled language server. Note: This will be automatically enabled for Ballerina versions older than 2201.12.3.

ballerina.enableSequenceDiagramView.description: Enable the experimental Sequence Diagram View.

ballerina.enableAiSuggestions.description: Enable AI suggestions in the Flow Diagram View.

ballerina.showAdvancedAiNodes.description: Show advanced AI nodes (Chunker, Vector Store, Embedding Provider, Recursive Document Chunker) in the Flow Diagram View's node palette.

ballerina-vscode.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the Ballerina language server.
enumDescriptions: Trace request/response messages with parameters and content

ballerina.copilot.checkpoints.enabled.description: Enable checkpoint mechanism for copilot chat to restore previous states.

ballerina.copilot.checkpoints.maxCount.description: Maximum number of checkpoints to keep.

ballerina.copilot.checkpoints.ignorePatt.description: File patterns to ignore when creating checkpoints.

ballerina.ai.showContextUsage.description: Show context usage indicator in the AI chat input footer.

script.description: Path of the script that need to be executed (e.g. ${workspaceRoot}/main.bal)

debugServerTimeout.description: How long to wait for the debug server to start up in milliseconds

debugTests.description: Indicates whether to debug the tests for the given script.

networkLogs.description: Indicates whether to capture network logs.

enumDescriptions: Launch program in an integrated VSCode terminal.
Launch program in an external terminal.
terminal.description: Indicates the terminal kind to launch the debugging process in.

choreoConnect.description: Connect with WSO2 Cloud when launching the app

commands.title: Check drift between code and documentation (Experimental)
Configure default model for natural functions (Experimental)

viewsWelcome.contents:
Tracing is disabled. Enable tracing to view traces from your Ballerina program.
[Enable Tracing](command:ballerina.enableTracing)
No traces collected yet. Run your Ballerina program to see traces here.

No agent traces found. None of the collected traces contain agent spans.
[Show All Traces](command:ballerina.toggleAgentFilter)

scripts.e2e-test-setup: npx extest get-vscode -c 1.100.0 && npx extest get-chromedriver -c 1.100.0 && npx extest install-vsix -f $(ls vsix/*.vsix)
scripts.e2e-test:download-prerelease: DOWNLOAD_PRERELEASE=true pnpm exec playwright test -c e2e-test/playwright.config.js
scripts.build: pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint && pnpm run postbuild
scripts.rebuild: pnpm run clean && pnpm run compile && pnpm run postbuild
scripts.postbuild: pnpm run download-ls && pnpm run copyFonts && pnpm run copyJSLibs && pnpm run package && pnpm run copyVSIX
scripts.copyJSLibs: copyfiles -f ../ballerina-visualizer/build/*.js resources/jslibs && copyfiles -f ../ballerina-visualizer/build/images/* resources/jslibs/images && copyfiles -f ../trace-visualizer/build/*.js resources/jslibs && copyfiles -f ../graphql/build/*.js resources/jslibs
